entity.summary: Solana-native non-custodial decentralized exchange providing on-chain spot and derivatives trading, with current mainnet markets and first-party volume reporting.
entity.notes: Current first-party product surfaces identify Deriverse as a Solana mainnet exchange and expose live platform statistics. A first-party production API reports current spot volume. No exact initial launch date, legal entity, or jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Deriverse official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website identifies a fully on-chain, non-custodial Solana exchange and exposes live mainnet platform statistics.

evidence.title: Deriverse mainnet volume API
evidence.notes: First-party production API reports current Solana mainnet spot-volume windows and supports the active classification.
